_comment: Small Club rig — 4 PAR LED cans, 1 moving head wash, 1 strobe, 1 fog. ~47 DMX channels.
name: Small Club
description: Compact venue rig typical of a 200-cap club. Two front-facing wash PARs, two back/side PARs for rear fill and silhouette, one moving head wash for beam movement, one strobe, and a fog machine. Limited channel budget keeps patching simple in QLC+. Maximum two independently controlled color zones at any time.

wash_all.label: Front Wash
wash_all.description: Two RGBW PAR cans aimed at the dance floor from front truss or stand.

back_wash.label: Back / Side Fill
back_wash.description: Two RGBW PARs on rear truss or floor stands, aimed toward performers / booth for silhouette and rear fill.

moving_heads.label: Moving Head Wash
moving_heads.description: Single 15-channel RGBW moving head wash. Provides beam movement and mid-air colour mixing above the floor.

strobe.label: Strobe
strobe.description: Single LED strobe bar mounted above the dance floor.

spots.label: Spots
spots.description: No dedicated spots in this rig. The moving head wash doubles as a spot. Cues targeting this group fall through to wash_all.

constraints.note: With only one moving head, avoid running fast pan + full-intensity strobe simultaneously — the moving head dimmer should drop to 40% during strobe bursts to prevent visual clutter.

cue_rendering.wash: All four PARs set to target colour at target intensity. Moving head matches colour. Single-zone result.
cue_rendering.pulse: Both front PARs bump to peak intensity for duration; back PARs stay at 60% of front level to preserve rear fill.
cue_rendering.strobe_hit: strobe_1 fires at requested intensity. Front PARs and moving head dimmer drop to 30% during burst to let strobe read clearly.
cue_rendering.color_shift: All four PARs and moving head snap or fade to new colour together. With max_color_zones=2, front PARs get primary colour, back PARs get complementary.
cue_rendering.movement_enable: mh_wash_1 executes requested pattern at requested speed. Only one moving head so pattern is simple arc or figure-8.
cue_rendering.fade_out: All groups ramp dimmer to target_intensity over fade_time. Moving head speed set to 0 during full blackout.
